display_information.name: PT Biz SMS
display_information.description: A real time SMS insights dashboard integrated with Slack, Aloware, and Monday.com.
display_information.long_description:
PT Biz SMS Insights is a real time SMS analytics dashboard built for high performance coaching and sales teams.

Integrated directly with Slack, Aloware, and Monday.com, it centralizes campaign performance, conversation tracking, and revenue attribution into a single operational view. Your team can monitor messaging activity as it happens, generate structured daily reports, and track booked calls and outcomes without digging through multiple systems.

SMS Insights provides:

Real time campaign monitoring with live KPIs and performance metrics
Daily automated reports with sales data, response rates, and booked calls
Conversation level tracking across channels with SLA visibility
Attribution and sequence analytics to understand what is actually driving revenue
A modern interactive dashboard designed for operators, not just analysts

Instead of manually pulling data from different tools, your team gets a single source of truth for SMS performance and pipeline impact.

slash_commands.description: Ask the SMS Insights bot a question or request an analytics query
Generate a rich daily SMS performance report with interactive buttons
Post the weekly setter scoreboard — bookings, sequences, reply rates & compliance
